word: G3606 - ὅθεν - hóthen - hoth'-en - From thence

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3739 with the directive enclitic of source; from which place or source or cause (adverbially or conjugationally): - from thence, (from) whence, where (-by, -fore, -upon).
